reference: I am twenty-two. It has been more than a month since I stopped masturbating. Sometimes, inside my brain, I feel different kinds of sensations, and I experience mood swings—sometimes depression, sometimes excitement, sometimes aggression. I am not sure if masturbating is good or bad yet. Will it affect my sex life in the future? Should I start masturbating again? Should I continue what I am doing right now?
